defs: sigil; talismanic mark or symbol; (ritual) seal
in accordance with; to agree with; to conform to; to meet (a requirement)

pinyin: Fu2 la1 di2 wo4 si1 tuo1 ke4
defs: Vladivostok (Russian port city) (Chinese name: 海參崴|海参崴[Hai3 shen1 wai3])
a charm to protect against evil spirits
(Taoism) talisman in the form of a painting of symbols thought to have magical powers
synoptic gospels (i.e. Matthew, Mark and Luke, with similar accounts and chronology)
Württemberg, region of southwest Germany, former state around Stuttgart 斯圖加特|斯图加特[Si1 tu2 jia1 te4]
